overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic Quadra vehicle through rainy neon-lit city highways and tunnels at night. The footage features dynamic weather with heavy rain, wet reflective roads, and transitions between open urban environments and enclosed tunnel systems.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: vehicle enters tunnel from open highway

agents.ego_description: driving on wet highway at moderate speed, approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: red sedan maintaining steady speed ahead in same lane

entered.detail: metal safety barriers with yellow reflective strips lining both sides of the road
dark concrete tunnel mouth with illuminated edges
futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows and holographic billboards
tall curved lamp posts with warm orange illumination

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated wet highway at night through a futuristic cityscape. Neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the distance while the vehicle approaches a dark tunnel entrance. A red sedan travels ahead in the same lane, and metal guardrails line both sides of the rain-slicked road.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete tunnel with linear overhead lighting

events.description: entering tunnel switches from ambient neon lighting to bright artificial overhead lights
approaching tunnel exit, daylight and outdoor environment become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the curved tunnel following the red vehicle

notable_agents.action: red sedan navigating tunnel curves ahead with brake lights occasionally illuminating

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete walls with horizontal construction lines and reflective strips
bright linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Driving through an enclosed concrete tunnel illuminated by bright overhead fluorescent lights. The smooth grey walls create a narrow corridor effect while following the red sedan ahead. The tunnel exit becomes visible in the distance as a bright opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial boulevard with palm tree landscaping

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open rainy urban environment with palm trees
accelerating along tree-lined boulevard with gentle curves

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets lined with palm trees and modern architecture, passing oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: oncoming traffic in opposite lanes with headlights visible through rain

entered.detail: tall tropical palm trees lining both sides of the street
contemporary glass and steel high-rise structures with illuminated windows
landscaped bushes and greenery between road and buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a rain-soaked urban boulevard lined with tall palm trees. Modern glass office buildings rise on the right while the vehicle navigates gentle curves on the wet asphalt. Oncoming traffic appears in the opposite lanes, headlights cutting through the rainy haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with traffic control signals

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light and cross traffic
slowing down significantly to navigate intersection and avoid cross traffic

agents.ego_description: slowing vehicle to stop at intersection, waiting for cross traffic to clear before proceeding

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi crossing the intersection from left to right
vehicle ahead braking at the red light

entered.detail: overhead traffic light fixture showing red signal
zebra crossing markings painted on the wet pavement
illuminated billboards and storefront signs along the street

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major urban intersection with red traffic lights overhead. The vehicle slows down significantly as a yellow taxi crosses from the left. Wet crosswalk markings are visible on the pavement, and commercial signage illuminates the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway through suburban fringe with dense vegetation

events.description: accelerating onto open highway after clearing intersection
navigating sharp curves through densely vegetated area

agents.ego_description: following a white SUV at high speed through winding highway curves, braking on turns

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving ahead with brake lights illuminating on curves

entered.detail: silver-white sport utility vehicle with red tail lights
thick trees and bushes creating a green corridor along the highway
roadside warning signs indicating upcoming curves

segments.scene_description: Accelerating onto a winding highway through a densely vegetated area, following a white SUV. The road curves through thick forest vegetation on both sides, with guardrails now on the left. The vehicle maintains high speed while braking for curves, tail lights of the SUV ahead glowing red through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a neon-lit urban highway through a sterile tunnel and into a rain-soaked forest corridor. It begins on an elevated, rain-slicked highway flanked by metal guardrails, following a red sedan toward the dark mouth of a tunnel. As the vehicle enters the enclosure, the open cityscape is replaced by a narrow corridor of grey concrete illuminated by bright overhead fluorescent lights before the camera emerges back into the open air. The scene then expands onto a wet urban boulevard lined with palm trees and glass office buildings, slowing down at a major intersection where headlights cut through the rainy haze and a yellow taxi crosses the path. Finally, the vehicle accelerates away from the city center, weaving through a winding highway enclosed by thick forest vegetation while following the glowing red taillights of a white SUV.
